mapper.sql: select id, attended_time, unit_name, unit_id, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_id, chief_duty_zhiwu, telephone_bg, telephone_ss, chief_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_id, duty_offier_zw, duty_offier_phone, duty_phone, duty_gangwei from bdgl_grassduty
mapper.select:
SELECT b.attended_time as zbTime, b.unit_name as dwmc, b.chief_duty_name as zbsz, b.duty_offier_name as zby, b.duty_phone as phone, s.dept_name AS zbgw FROM bdgl_grassduty b LEFT JOIN sys_dept s ON b.duty_gangwei = s.dept_id WHERE attended_time = #{date} and unit_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into bdgl_grassduty
id, attended_time, unit_name, unit_id, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_id, chief_duty_zhiwu, telephone_bg, telephone_ss, chief_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_id, duty_offier_zw, duty_offier_phone, duty_phone, duty_gangwei,
#{id}, #{attendedTime}, #{unitName}, #{unitId}, #{chiefDutyName}, #{chiefDutyId}, #{chiefDutyZhiwu}, #{telephoneBg}, #{telephoneSs}, #{chiefDutyPhone}, #{dutyOffierName}, #{dutyOffierId}, #{dutyOffierZw}, #{dutyOffierPhone}, #{dutyPhone}, #{dutyGangwei},
mapper.delete:
delete from bdgl_grassduty where id in
#{id}
